scenarios.label: Clear Skies (Low Risk < 0.3)
scenarios.description: Jaipur on a dry, calm day. No disruption expected.

scenarios.label: Moderate Rain (Risk ~0.5)
scenarios.description: Kanpur with sustained rainfall. Elevated but manageable.

scenarios.label: Storm (Critical Risk > 0.8)
scenarios.description: Agra under heavy storm. Highway flooding on Agra-Delhi corridor.
scenarios.expected_action: CRITICAL: Immediate reroute via Gwalior or Kanpur.

usage.notes: Set gemini_alert to null to let P2's Gemini service generate it automatically. Or pass a custom string to override.
